violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. Observed a whole in the ceiling by the pizza area.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Observed a fly strip hanging from ceiling in the kitchen at time of inspection.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed ice chute on Coke dispenser has slimy substance in it.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed dust and debris on wall by pizza oven.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed hole in sheetrock on wall by pizza oven.
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
